narrative:
Springboro City 2-A (precinct in Warren County) has 774 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points.
